name: slo-queue-resync-failures
description: Alert when queue resync failure rate exceeds 0.5% over 10 minutes.
query: customEvents | where name == 'queue_resync' | extend payload=todynamic(customDimensions.metadataJson) | summarize total=count(), failed=countif(tostring(payload.error) != '') by bin(timestamp, 10m) | extend failure_pct=iff(total==0, 0.0, todouble(failed) * 100.0 / todouble(total))
